blocks.html: Open claude.ai in your laptop browser
Click Customize in the left sidebar
Select Connectors from the menu
Click + then Add custom connector

Add name & Paste the server URL:
https://api.neosapien.xyz/mcp
Click “Add”
Select NeoSapien from connectors list and tap “Connect” to sign in to NeoSapien account (OAuth)
Sign in to NeoSapien when prompted (OAuth)
Open chat, enable NeoSapien & try your first prompt: “What do you know about me from Neosapien?”
Congrats NeoSapien is now connected to Claude.

blocks.title: If NeoSapien MCP doesn’t work or appear in the chat, do one of these:
blocks.html:
• Add “from NeoSapien” to your message
  • Close the tab and reopen Claude
  • Re-authenticate with the existing NeoSapien account
  • Remove the NeoSapien from connectors and add it again.

blocks.text: Here’s what it does for you
blocks.sub: You ask, Neo 1 recalls, your AI does the work. Things you can do:

items.title: Catch up on your day
items.desc: “Summarise everything I said today.”

items.title: Draft your replies
items.desc: “Write the follow up email on what I owe Subodh”

items.title: Prep for what’s next
items.desc: “Prep me for my meeting with Mohit, what did he ask last time?”

items.title: Recall any detail
items.desc: “What’s the medicine I discussed for my father?”

items.title: Turn talk into to-dos
items.desc: “Make a task list from my last daily standup”

items.title: Work across your tools
items.desc: “Add those tasks to my Notion.” Your AI has both Neo 1 and your other apps.

items.title: Export data
items.desc: "Export all memories from yesterday as a CSV"

items.title: Not getting results?
items.desc: Add “from NeoSapien” to your message.

blocks.html: Ensure Claude Code CLI is installed:
Open terminal, run Claude and then run this command:

blocks.text: claude mcp add --transport http neosapien https://api.neosapien.xyz/mcp

blocks.html: Inside Claude code run /mcp → select neosapien → Authenticate - it opens a browser to sign in.
Sign in to NeoSapien when prompted (OAuth) & Run claude mcp list or claude mcp get neosapien in terminal to verify the status.
Open a new Claude Code chat & try your first prompt: “What do you know about me from Neosapien?”
Congrats NeoSapien is now connected to Claude Code.

blocks.title: Not getting results?
blocks.html: Append “from NeoSapien MCP” to your message.
